name: Usermaven
description: Usermaven — Privacy-first product and marketing analytics platform with funnels, attribution, and CRM sync.

seo.title: Usermaven — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Usermaven: Usermaven — Privacy-first product and marketing analytics platform with funnels, attribution, and CRM sync.

when_to_use: Privacy-first funnel analysis tracking user conversion paths
Product analytics with CRM sync for PLG conversion insights
Marketing attribution dashboard connecting ad channels to signups
User behavior analytics without third-party data sharing
PQL identification by combining product signals with CRM data

pros: Product + marketing analytics in one dashboard
CRM sync keeps sales informed of usage
review.verdict: Solid SMB alternative to Mixpanel with privacy baked in; not the tool for 100-person analytics orgs.
review.best_for: SMB SaaS wanting product analytics without Amplitude pricing
review.not_for: Enterprise data teams needing deep custom event schemas
